what_it_does: Defines a 24x24 SVG icon showing a rectangular blueprint or floor-plan outline with internal divisions and two filled point markers.
observations: The SVG uses a 24 by 24 viewBox with explicit width and height of 24.
It has no fill by default and uses currentColor for strokes.
Stroke styling is set to 1.5 width with round caps and joins.
The drawing consists of two path elements and two filled circles.
The outer path draws a rectangular frame from coordinates 3,5 to 21,19.
The inner path draws partition-like lines within the rectangle.
Two small filled circles appear at cx 15 cy 9 and cx 6 cy 9.
standouts: CurrentColor styling makes the icon inherit text or UI color.
The composition reads as a blueprint or floor-plan symbol through frame, partitions, and markers.
conventions: Follows common icon SVG conventions: 24x24 viewBox, currentColor stroke, no default fill, rounded stroke caps and joins.
Uses inline SVG primitives without classes, ids, metadata, or external references.
concerns: The file is minified onto one line, which makes manual diffs and inspection less readable.
notes: A small reusable blueprint/floor-plan icon built from stroked paths and filled marker dots.
questions: Are the two filled dots intended to represent rooms, anchors, or generic points of interest?
purpose_vs_actual: Matches the filename: the file is a blueprint-themed SVG icon.
intention_signals: It appears intended to provide a lightweight, themeable blueprint/floor-plan icon for a design system asset set.
novelty: The icon combines plan-like partition lines with two filled point markers inside the same outlined frame.
contribution: Contributes a compact currentColor blueprint/floor-plan icon that a fused system could keep as a reusable visual symbol for layout, planning, or design-related actions.
summary_for_embedding: A 24x24 currentColor SVG blueprint icon composed of an outer rectangle, internal partition lines, and two filled circular markers.
intention_for_embedding: This file was for providing a scalable design-system icon representing a blueprint or floor plan.
